title: Schizostachyum scandens
taxonomy: Schizostachyum scandens is a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Schizostachyum, which is a group of woody bamboo species. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as grasses. The Poaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Bambusoideae subfamily, which includes all bamboo species. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Schizostachyum scandens within the plant kingdom.
